scripts.compact:all: npm run compact:order && npm run compact:matching && npm run compact:settlement && npm run compact:liquidation && npm run compact:aggregate
scripts.compact:order: compact compile src/charli3perp-order.compact src/managed/charli3perp-order && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/charli3perp-order
scripts.compact:matching: compact compile src/charli3perp-matching.compact src/managed/charli3perp-matching && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/charli3perp-matching
scripts.compact:settlement: compact compile src/charli3perp-settlement.compact src/managed/charli3perp-settlement && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/charli3perp-settlement
scripts.compact:liquidation: compact compile src/charli3perp-liquidation.compact src/managed/charli3perp-liquidation && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/charli3perp-liquidation
scripts.compact:aggregate: compact compile src/charli3perp-aggregate.compact src/managed/charli3perp-aggregate && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/charli3perp-aggregate
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -R src/managed dist/managed && cp src/*.compact dist/ && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs dist/managed/charli3perp-order dist/managed/charli3perp-matching dist/managed/charli3perp-settlement dist/managed/charli3perp-liquidation dist/managed/charli3perp-aggregate
